ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_elements" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the code element */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the code element (e.g., function, class, method, variable) */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the code element */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters of the code element */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the code element */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the code element (e.g., public, private, protected) */,
  "initializer" TEXT /* Initializer of the code element */,
  "access_modifier" TEXT /* Access modifier of the code element (e.g., public, private, protected) */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Whether the code element is static */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Whether the code element is virtual */,
  "is_inline" INTEGER /* Whether the code element is inline */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Whether the code element is final */,
  "is_sealed" INTEGER /* Whether the code element is sealed */,
  "is_new" INTEGER /* Whether the code element is new */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code element */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the code element */,
  "start_line" INTEGER /* Start line number of the code element */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* End line number of the code element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "element1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first code element */,
  "element2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second code element */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., inheritance, composition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_element2_id FOREIGN KEY ("element2_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_element1_id FOREIGN KEY ("element1_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project owner */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_snippets" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code snippet */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code snippet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code snippet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code snippet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_memberships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project membership */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_memberships_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("id")
)
